name: Shanghai Smith Adhesive New Material Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai Smith Adhesive New Material Co., Ltd manufactures and sells various adhesive tapes under the Ginnva brand in China. The company offers masking, duct, rice paper, electronics, foam, aluminum foil, and kraft paper tapes, as well as BOPP tapes, such as packing and stationery tapes. It serves various industries, including electronics, new materials, office supplies, packaging materials, and warning labels, as well as auto and hardware building industries. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries, such as Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Europe, South America, and Africa. Shanghai Smith Adhesive New Material Co., Ltd was founded in 2006 and is based in Shanghai, China.
